creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  FreeBSD ports repository

    databases/py-qt4-sql Makefile distinfo pkg-plist

    textproc             Makefile

    www                  Makefile 
    x11/py-qt4-opengl    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/py-kde  Makefile distinfo 
    x11-toolkits/py-qt   Makefile distinfo 
    x11-toolkits/py-qt4-gui Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    x11-toolkits/qscintilla Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-qt4-help    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/py-qt4-phonon Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    textproc/py-qt4-xmlpatterns Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                pkg-plist 
    www/py-qt4-webkit    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Removed files:
    devel/py-qt4-qscintilla2/files Makefile.in 
  Log:
  Update PyQt4 ports to 4.4.4, new ports:
  devel/py-qt4-help
  multimedia/py-qt4-phonon
  textproc/py-qt4-xmlpatterns
  www/py-qt4-webkit
  
  Update QScintilla2 to 2.3.2, PyQt3 to 3.17.6, PyKDE3 to 3.16.2.
  
  Pass maintainership to kde@FreeBSD.org. Thanks Danny Ricin for his great work.
  
  PR:             based on ports/130219
  Submitted by:   Dima Panov" <fluffy at fluffy.khv.ru>
